title: Smooth Lava X Bare Bones
description: This resource pack is meant to bring the lava textures that you see in the 1.16 Nether Update Promo Art to Bare Bones. It has a simplified version of the lava texture into a more "Bare Bones" or Minecraft Trailer Style.
body:
**Smooth Lava × Bare Bones**

This add‑on brings smooth, promo‑style lava inspired by the Nether Update artwork. It’s designed to pair naturally with Bare Bones for a clean, stylized look — though it can be used on its own (it will look a bit weird without Bare Bones).

🔥**What This Pack Adds**

Smooth, promo‑style lava inspired by official Nether Update visuals

Designed to pair with Bare Bones for the best visual consistency

Works great with BSL shaders (as shown in the thumbnail and gallery)

Only retextures lava — no other textures are included

⚠️**Important Notes**

This pack ONLY changes lava

To get the full visual style, download Bare Bones separately

No association with Bare Bones — the name reflects compatibility only

Recommended setup: Bare Bones + BSL + correct shader settings for the promo‑art look

💬**Issues or Reports**

If you have any issues or want to report something, you can reach me here:
👉 https://discord.com/channels/734077874708938864/1508520834980122745
